**PROJECT.pdf alignment**

<!--
Cross-reference against PDF §1-2 (positioning + MVP scope) and §5
("Девять UX-принципов"). Specifically: does the feature avoid
recommendations / autoplay / infinite scroll / streaks?

Won't-have list (PDF §2 — explicitly out of scope for MVP):
- Learning plans / structured courses
- Social / sharing
- Flashcards
- AI agent walking through material
- Books / podcasts / academic PDFs as sources
- Mobile app (phase 2)
- Team / org features
- Paid tiers
- Gamification / streaks
- Folders inside a workspace
- Quick-save inbox without a workspace

If your idea is in the won't-have list, discuss the trade-off explicitly
before opening a PR.
-->
